tasks.subject: Task 1: Update TagFilter for mobile-accessible tag editing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace hover-only pencil button with always-visible pencil on the last-tapped active tag.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/filters/TagFilter.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Pencil icon not visible by default
- [ ] Tapping a tag activates it and shows pencil on that tag only
- [ ] Tapping another tag moves the pencil to the new tag
- [ ] Deactivating a tag removes the pencil
- [ ] Сбросить clears both selection and pencil
- [ ] Active tag without pencil: rounded-full
- [ ] Active tag with pencil: rounded-l-full + rounded-r-full pencil button
- [ ] Offline: pencil button disabled

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/tasks/TaskTagPicker.test.tsx` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/filters/TagFilter.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/tasks/TaskTagPicker.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pencil not visible by default", "Tapping activates and shows pencil", "Pencil moves to last-tapped tag", "Deactivating removes pencil", "Сбросить clears pencil", "Active+pencil: split pill style", "Offline: pencil disabled"]}
```
